description: Delicious Coconut Rice Bowl is healthy and adaptable! Curried jasmine rice cooked in coconut milk topped with your choice of protein, and seasonal vegetables all tossed with a simple sauce, fresh cilantro, mint and toasted coconut flakes.
ingredients: [{"name": "rice", "units": "cups", "amount": 2}, {"name": "coconut milk", "units": "can", "amount": 1}, {"name": "water", "units": "cups", "amount": 1.75}, {"name": "yellow curry powder", "units": "teaspoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "sea salt", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "ginger", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "sriracha", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "coconut sugar", "units": "teaspoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "coconut oil", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "tofu", "units": "oz", "amount": 16}, {"name": "garlic", "units": "cloves", "amount": 4}, {"name": "lemongrass", "units": "teaspoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "asparagus", "units": "pound", "amount": 1}, {"name": "green onions", "units": "units", "amount": 2}, {"name": "peas", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.5}, {"name": "lime juice", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "cilantro", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.25}, {"name": "mint", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.25}, {"name": "toasted coconut flakes", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.5}]
instructions: 1. Cook the rice: Add rice, coconut milk, water, curry powder, salt, and ginger. Bring to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes. 2. Make the Sauce: Whisk together sriracha, soy sauce, and coconut sugar. Set aside. 3. Pat tofu dry and cut into thick strips. Prep veggies. 4. Sear Tofu: Heat a pan to med-high, add coconut oil, sear tofu for about 3 minutes on each side. 5. Sauté Veggies: In the same pan, sauté asparagus for about 1 minute, add garlic, lemongrass, ginger, and cook until tender. 6. Combine: Add tofu, sauce, peas, and lime juice, stirring to combine. Serve with rice and top with mint, cilantro, and coconut flakes.
notes: Leftovers can be kept in the fridge for 3-4 days. Coconut rice can be frozen for up to 3 months.
